retrieved_result: Definitions &Translations Wiktionary (0.00 / 0 votes)Rate this definition:remise (Noun)The repetition or return of the opening material later in a composition.remise (Noun)A renewal of a failed action, without withdrawing the arm.remise (Verb)To surrender all interest in a property by executing a deed, to quitclaim. Webster
